text:
There once was a kid named Timmy who lived in a tiny town surrounded by fields of wildflowers. Timmy loved exploring beyond the town's borders. One sunny afternoon, he found himself wandering aimlessly through a grove of old oak trees.

As he wandered deeper into the heart of the woods, he stumbled upon an old farmhouse. The house was covered in vines and had a thatched roof, like a cottage from a fairy tale. Curious, Timmy climbed up onto a low wall to get a better look.

Inside the farmhouse stood a tall oak table. At its head was a sturdy wooden bowl filled with a glowing amber liquid. There were also several odd-looking bottles on the shelf behind it. Something about the setting seemed magical.

Timmy edged closer to investigate. Just as he was about to take a sip, a small but fierce-looking brown bear emerged from somewhere behind the house. It sniffed at Timmy, then paused sharply and backed away, ears flat against its head
